regional_cost_note: Builders in New Plymouth typically charge $80–$115/hr. New build costs range $2,600–$3,800/m². Taranaki’s oil & gas industry has historically kept tradesperson wages competitive.

businesses.name: Devarga Building
businesses.known_for: Residential building specialist covering new builds, renovations, landscaping construction, retaining walls, and decking across the Taranaki region.

businesses.name: Pride Building Taranaki Ltd
businesses.known_for: Full-service residential builder handling everything from door repairs to complete new homes, including architecture & design, kitchens, bathrooms, and roofing.

businesses.name: Heartwood Carpentry Limited
businesses.known_for: High-end residential carpentry and renovations specialising in extensions, decking, fencing, cabinetry, kitchens, bathrooms, and custom timber work.

businesses.name: Paterson Contracting (Taranaki) Ltd
businesses.known_for: Residential builder offering fencing & gates, landscaping, sheds, and handyman services across the Taranaki region.

businesses.name: Constructing Solutions Ltd
businesses.known_for: LBP-qualified Certified Passive House Design Professional offering residential builds, architectural design, custom metalwork, gates, furniture, and landscape solutions.
